title: Governed agents: Looker + MCP explained
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates how Looker's semantic layer integrates with the Model Context Protocol and Agent Development Kit to ground LLM-based agents in validated business models rather than raw SQL generation. The Looker MCP Server enables agents to query data through a governed, centralized semantic layer.
